rubrics.rubric: Are the three source files `4-financial-table-income-expense-dashboard.xlsx`, `5-financial-table-income-expense-profit-statement_visual-charts_.xlsx`, and `6-financial-table-income-and-expense-data-visual-charts.xlsx` successfully located and accessible?

rubrics.rubric: Does the comparison table header correctly contain the four columns "File name", "Expense item rank", "Expense item name", and "Expense amount"?
rubrics.evidence: The generated comparison table's headers are ['Source File', 'Rank', 'Expense Item', 'Amount', 'Status / Error'], it does not contain the required four headers, adds an extra error status column, and does not match the required header structure.

rubrics.rubric: Does the comparison table contain 15 complete rows of data, excluding the header?
rubrics.evidence: The generated Excel only has 3 incomplete rows of null data after the header, instead of the required 15 complete rows (top 5 expenses from each of the 3 source files). No valid expense data was added to the table.

rubrics.rubric: Is the bar chart created from all data in the comparison table, and is there at least one chart object in the worksheet?
rubrics.evidence: No valid bar chart object was added to the generated Excel worksheet; the workbook creation code did not implement a functional bar chart, and no usable expense data existed to generate a chart.

rubrics.rubric: Is the chart title "Comparison of Top 5 Spending Item Amounts for Each File", and does it clearly show the amount differences among items?
rubrics.evidence: No bar chart was generated in the output Excel file, so the specified chart title and amount difference display functionality cannot be verified.

rubrics.rubric: Is the chart a horizontal bar chart, with categories on the Y axis and values on the X axis, making item-by-item comparison easier?
rubrics.evidence: No bar chart was generated in the output Excel file, so the chart format and axis settings cannot be verified.

rubrics.evidence: No valid bar chart was created to place alongside the comparison table, so the required layout arrangement cannot be verified.
